title: Classic+
description: For those looking for a classic+ experience with many QOL improvements. Here not be dragons, except one!
body: Had to use Classic+ because Vanilla+ was taken already. Classic+ is a QOL overhaul for vanilla minecraft, adding many improvements and updates that, let's face it, should be the standard. The goal is to have fun, and if ye came seeking dragons, you'll find naught but one.
